visual_description: A close-up shot shows a young man with round glasses and dark hair, looking intently forward with a serious expression. The scene then cuts to a high-angle view of a cluttered, dimly lit room filled with various objects, including a large, twisted tree-like structure in the center. A person in dark clothing walks through the room, moving from the foreground toward the background.
audio_description: A low, ominous musical score plays, creating a suspenseful and mysterious atmosphere.
